title: lithocarpus fenzelianus
intro: Lithocarpus fenzelianus, also known as the Himalayan Lithocarpus, is a species of deciduous tree native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus fenzelianus are believed to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus fenzelianus are typically made by extracting its leaves and roots, and can be found in various forms such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
